Effective Date: January 1, 2026

We collect account information, support transcripts, device identifiers, approximate location, and product usage data to provide support, secure accounts, improve the service, and personalize recommendations.

Users may opt out of analytics sharing and personalized recommendations. If a user opts out, we will not use their product usage data or location data for analytics sharing or personalization.

We verify account ownership before processing deletion, export, or account-change requests.
